name: docsbot-mcp
description: Administer DocsBot from Codex through authorized dashboard access.

interface.shortDescription: Administer DocsBot teams, bots, sources, and settings from Codex.
interface.longDescription: Connect Codex to DocsBot Administration for managing DocsBot teams, bots, sources, members, integrations, Skills, reporting, and supported billing settings through existing dashboard permissions. Agents use a compact search and execute tool interface backed by the DocsBot Admin API catalog, with browser-based OAuth, Dynamic Client Registration, and live DocsBot RBAC checks on each action.
defaultPrompt: Use DocsBot Administration to find my teams and bots.
Search DocsBot Administration for source operations.
Use DocsBot Administration to review bot activity.
